name: Skor Toffee Candy Bar Ice Cream
recipeIngredient: 6 1/4 oz Skor Toffee Candy Bars; 5 Bars (English Toffee Can Be Used)
recipeInstructions:
1. Line a 9 X 5 X 2-inch loaf pan with foil and set aside.
2. Beat the egg yolks in a large mixing bowl with a wire whisk, blending in the sweetened milk, water, and vanilla.
3. Finely chop the candy bars by hand or in a food processor to measure 1 1/4 cups, then set aside.
4. Beat the whipping cream in a large mixer bowl until stiff.
5. Fold the chopped candy with the whipped cream into the egg yolk mixture.
6. Pour into the prepared pan and cover.
7. Freeze for 6 hours or until firm.
